{{Quote|I killed Beda's husband and Eremay's father, and condemned ''them'' to a life in exile. Naturally they want me dead.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker]]|<ref name="Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen">''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]''</ref>}}
'''Eremay Ies''' was the daughter of [[Daxar Ies|Daxar]] and [[Beda Ies]].

==Biography==
When Eremay and her mother returned home one day, they found [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], who at that time was serving as [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Hand]], searching through Dexar's desk for a list of bank accounts which he had placed two billion [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] of the Emperor's personal funds into. Mara told Beda and Eremay to disappear forever, and they left for the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] and became [[Joiner]]s.

==Appearances==
